title: Universal Tool 10X 16mm Doublet Jewelers Loupe Chrome Body Folding Magnifier

Universal Tool 10X 16mm Doublet Jewelers Loupe Chrome Body Folding Magnifier

If you're a jewelry maker or hobby craft enthusiast, you've probably found yourself in a situation where you could use a better look at tiny gems, beads or other materials. With the Universal Tool 10X Folding Magnifier Loupe, you'll be able to do just that!

Jeweler's loupes are simple yet effective magnification devices designed to help you see small details more closely. Unlike a magnifying glass, loupes generally have a focusing lens that is contained in housing that protects the lens when not in use. Our loupe features a foldable aluminum body that will ensure that your lens is safe from scratches and fingerprints that may mar the view of the small items you're working with.

Key Features

  • 10X MAGNIFICATION POWER - Doublet Lens Loupe Magnifies Small Objects by 10 | Ideal for Jewelry Makers, Watch Repairs and Hobby Crafters Placing, Setting and Identifying Tiny Materials
  • FOLDING ALUMINUM BODY - Chrome-colored Aluminum Body Protects Lens From Scratches and Fingerprints When Not in Use | Durable Yet Lightweight Material Also Doubles as Handle for Ease of Use
  • 16MM DIAMETER LENS - Small Doublet Lens is Perfect Size for Viewing Beads, Gems, Rhinestones, Jewels, Sequins and Other Materials Requiring Precision
  • COMPACT DESIGN - Folded Length: 1.25" | Unfolded Length: 2.25" | Easily Fits Inside Most Craft Boxes, Hobby Tool Kits, Supply Drawers or Workshop Storage
  • VERSATILE MAGNIFIER - Designed for Jewelry Making but Great for Watchmaking/Repair, Photography, Printing, Dentistry, Tattooing, Biology/Geology, Coin Collecting and More

Product Specifications

  • MPN: UTALUMFL10X
  • UPC: 855569007256
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 10X

This loupe features a 10X magnification power, which means it will magnify whatever you're viewing by 10. This is a significant improvement when viewing intricate details, and will help jewelers, watchmakers or photographers pinpoint areas that need extra attention. The lens has a diameter of 16mm making it an ideal size for small items like beads, jewels, rhinestones, sequins and other items that require precision.

As stated previously, this loupe is housed inside of a durable yet lightweight folding aluminum body to protect the doublet lens, and measures just 1.25" in length when folded so it can easily fit inside just about any craft box, hobby tool kit or supply drawer. When unfolded, the folding body and lens measure 2.25" and the body even doubles as a handle for ease of use. Keep in mind that loupes are meant to be used with the lens close to the item you're magnifying so that they work properly.

In addition to jewelry making, watch repairs and other precision hobby crafts, loupes are great tools for other professions like printing, dentistry, geology, electronics repair and even tattooing! This is a must-have magnifying tool for anyone who needs a better look at small items and details.
